_comment: Dev seed for auth-db.js. Copy to auth-users.json (gitignored). Keys are user IDs; values list allowed games and optional roles.

playground._comment: Service-account principal for cube-playground. The playground server mints { game, userId: 'playground' } JWTs; this entry lets Cube's getUserAccess() resolve them. Mirror this in auth-users.json or override via CUBE_PLAYGROUND_USER_ID on the playground.
playground.name: cube-playground
